headline: World Cup Matches in US Face Heat Advisories, Storm Threats
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Both US coasts were under heat advisories Friday on the eve of FIFA World Cup matches scheduled in California’s Bay Area, New Jersey and Massachusetts. The biggest weather threat may come Sunday in Philadelphia, where lightning and thunderstorms could disrupt play.Most Read from BloombergWhy Musk Raced to Take SpaceX Public in the World’s Biggest IPOSpaceX IPO Raises $75 Billion in Biggest Debut of All TimeSpaceX Shares Close 19% Higher After Historic $75 Billion IPOUS, Iran Edge
